name: Integral Acquisition Corporation 1 Class A Common Stock
summary: Integral Acquisition Corporation 1 is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company's efforts to identify a target business will not be limited to a particular industry or geographic region, although it intends to focus on businesses in the technology and technology-enabled financial services sectors. The company is headquartered in New York, NY.
